_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber competitions as a way of developing skills by providing hands-on experience in simulated, real-world situations.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge sharing forums, best practice documentation, cross-team collaboration initiatives, and capability building activities.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.445), DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.426).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.456). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [competitions, cyber, developing, experience, hands, providing] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.851, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:2.6%, N:59.6%, C:37.8%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of cyber competitions as a way of developing skills by providing hands" vs "Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge s" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.477 ≈ STS 0.456 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [competitions, cyber, developing, experience, hands, providing]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration].
